Klasse MainView

java.lang.Object
java.awt.Component
java.awt.Container
java.awt.Window
java.awt.Frame
javax.swing.JFrame
view.MainView
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
ImageObserver, MenuContainer, Serializable, Accessible, RootPaneContainer, WindowConstants
public class MainView extends JFrame
Provides the main graphical user interface for the project management tool.

This class extends JFrame to serve as the primary standalone window. Acting strictly as the View in the MVC architecture, it contains purely display elements and layout configurations without maintaining any business logic.

Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Konstruktordetails

    • MainView

      public MainView()
      Creates the main view and initializes the graphical user interface components.

      This constructor sets up the top-level container layout, defines the interactive controls (such as buttons and combo boxes), and prepares the central HTML-capable editor pane for rendering tasks.

  • Methodendetails

    • getAddButton

      public JButton getAddButton()
      Gets the button used to add a new task.

      This method exposes the component so the controller can register an action listener.

      Gibt zurück:
      the add button, not null

    • getDeleteButton

      public JButton getDeleteButton()
      Gets the button used to delete a task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the delete button, not null

      Gets the button used to start time tracking.

      Gets the button used to edit a task.

      public String getTitleInput()
      Gets the current text input for the task's title.

      the title input string, not null

      public String getDescriptionInput()
      Gets the current text input for the task's description.

      the description input string, not null

      public String getInitialTimeInput()
      Gets the current text input for the initial time.
      Gibt zurück:
      the initial time input string, not null

    • getDeadlineInput

      public String getDeadlineInput()
      Gets the current text input for the deadline.
      Gibt zurück:
      the deadline input string, not null

    • getAssigneeInput

      public String getAssigneeInput()
      Gets the currently selected assignee from the dropdown.

      If no item is selected, an empty string is returned.

      Gibt zurück:
      the selected assignee, not null

    • getHelpButton

      public JButton getHelpButton()
      Gets the button used to display help and FAQ.
      Gibt zurück:
      the help button, not null

    • addAssigneeToDropdown

      public void addAssigneeToDropdown(String newAssignee)
      Adds a new assignee to the dropdown list if it does not already exist.

      This method prevents duplication and ignores empty strings.

      Parameter:
      newAssignee - the name of the assignee to add, not null

    • getFilterComboBox

      public JComboBox<String> getFilterComboBox()
      Gets the combo box used for filtering tasks by status.
      Gibt zurück:
      the filter combo box, not null

    • getSortComboBox

      public JComboBox<String> getSortComboBox()
      Gets the combo box used for sorting tasks.
      Gibt zurück:
      the sort combo box, not null

    • getCommentButton

      public JButton getCommentButton()
      Gets the button used to add comments to a task.
      Gibt zurück:
      the comment button, not null

    • getAssigneeFilterComboBox

      public JComboBox<String> getAssigneeFilterComboBox()
      Gets the combo box used for filtering tasks by assignee.
      Gibt zurück:
      the assignee filter combo box, not null

    • updateAssigneeFilterList

      public void updateAssigneeFilterList(Set<String> uniqueAssignees)
      Updates the assignee filter dropdown with a new set of unique names.

      This method temporarily disconnects action listeners to prevent an infinite event loop while the list is being repopulated. It also attempts to restore the previously selected item after the update.

      Parameter:
      uniqueAssignees - the set of unique assignee names, not null

    • clearInputs

      public void clearInputs()
      Clears all user input fields in the view.

      This resets standard text fields to empty strings and the initial time field back to its default value of zero.

    • updateTaskList

      public void updateTaskList(ArrayList<Task> tasks)
      Updates the visual representation of the task list using formatted HTML.

      This method calculates the total and completed tasks, and constructs an HTML string with embedded CSS styling to display the task details, including assignees, tracked time, and current status.

      Parameter:
      tasks - the list of tasks to be displayed, not null
